findings.title: specflow.impl reads current-phase before resolving FEATURE_DIR
findings.detail: Step 0.5 derives FEATURE_DIR from check-prerequisites.sh but this command is not run until Step 2 setup. Add explicit check-prerequisites call in Step 0.5 or move setup earlier.

findings.title: Generated current-phase.md will leak into fix-review diffs
findings.detail: specflow.fix feeds git diff into review prompt. After this feature, current-phase.md will be reviewed as implementation. Exclude */current-phase.md from diff inputs.

findings.title: No validation for generation and recovery logic
findings.detail: Non-trivial behavior across three flows with no accompanying tests or scripted workflow checks. Add workflow-level coverage for generation, update, read, and malformed ledger cases.
findings.notes: Markdown-only project (slash command instruction files). No executable code exists to unit test. Validation is done via manual integration testing by running the specflow cycle, as specified in the plan.
